title: 100Pk Bendable Non Lethal Safety Pen, Flexible Ball Point Writing Pen Tool
description:
The Non-Lethal Flexible Ball Point Pens are a great option for providing a basic need in safe and responsible way for incarcerated inmates of jails, prisons, government detention centers and mental health facilities. There is virtually no way to utilize these pens as a deadly weapon, they are essential writing tools for patients who may be prone to hurting themselves or others around them. These reliable flexible ball point pens are made with a soft bendable outer casing that does not harden, but melts when exposed to open flame; its rubbery material folds under pressure and is only 4.25 inches in length, making it nearly impossible to do lethal damage with. Ball Point Ink color is available in Black or Blue. Made in USA

100Pk Bendable Non Lethal Safety Pen, Flexible Ball Point Writing Pen Tool

The Non-Lethal Flexible Ball Point Pens are a great option for providing a basic need in safe and responsible way for incarcerated inmates of jails, prisons, government detention centers and mental health facilities.

Key Features

  • Each pen will write for over 3500 feet
  • Non-Lethal Flexible writing tool
  • Weight: 0.01 oz.
  • Length: 4.5"
  • Includes 100 units

Product Specifications

  • MPN: PP100-4
  • UPC: 742309697597
